articles.title: Here are the dates for the Patriots’ offseason workout schedule
articles.description:
The Super Bowl runner-ups will return to action in a few weeks.

The post Here are the dates for the Patriots’ offseason workout schedule appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots' offseason workouts begin on April 17, 2026, in Foxborough.
Minicamp scheduled for June 6-8, 2026, at Gillette Stadium.
Local fans can expect player updates and team developments throughout the offseason.

articles.title: Patriots double up on edge rushers in latest ESPN mock draft
articles.description:
The Patriots have doubled up at a single position in the past. Could it happen this year with edge rushers?

The post Patriots double up on edge rushers in latest ESPN mock draft appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots may select two edge rushers in the upcoming NFL draft.
ESPN's mock draft suggests picks for Cashius Howell and Gabe Jacas.
This strategy could strengthen the Patriots' defense for the 2024 season.

articles.title: 12-year-old was arrested in death of a classmate who was hit in the head by a metal water bottle
articles.description:
Khimberly's family says she was struck in the head on Feb. 17 during a bullying incident at Reseda Charter High School, which also includes a middle school.

The post 12-year-old was arrested in death of a classmate who was hit in the head by a metal water bottle appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 12-year-old was arrested for the death of Khimberly after a bullying incident.
Khimberly was struck on the head with a metal water bottle on February 17.
This incident raises concerns about school safety and bullying in Boston schools.

articles.title: For a struggling Red Sox team, Friday’s opener at Fenway Park provided a fresh start
articles.description:
Winter is over. Baseball season has arrived.

The post For a struggling Red Sox team, Friday’s opener at Fenway Park provided a fresh start appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox opened the season at Fenway Park on April 3, 2026.
The team aims to improve after a disappointing previous season.
Local fans hope for a revitalized performance to boost community spirit.
